content: Tiny Tina's Assault on Dragon Keep
name: Fireball
description: A Maliwan spell grenade that launches a slow incendiary projectile in a straight line and detonates the instant it hits a surface or enemy. Its travel speed makes it most reliable in tight spaces or against sluggish targets, and like the other spell grenades it slowly regenerates grenade ammo over time.
notes:
Fire Storm is the upgraded legendary counterpart. The name references the Fireball spell from Dungeons & Dragons, while the red text nods to the dubbed G.I. Joe PSA parody with the "Porkchop sandwiches" line.

With Fireball equipped, Axton may yell "Fireball!" when deploying his Sabre Turret.

special.description: Launches a slow, straight-flying fireball that always deals incendiary damage and explodes on impact. Grenades regenerate over time.
special.title: Porkchop sandwiches!

abilities: Slowly regenerates grenade ammo over time.
